title: ZEROGEN: Efficient Zero-shot Learning via Dataset Generation
research_areas: T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering
